channel.title: Forge Hosting Blog
channel.description: Game server hosting tutorials, guides, and news from the Forge Hosting team.

item.title: How to Host a Minecraft Server for Free in 2026 (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Complete guide to setting up your own Minecraft server — Paper, Forge, Fabric, or Bedrock — in under 5 minutes with Forge Hosting. No credit card required.

item.title: 10 Best Free Game Server Hosting Providers in 2026
item.description: We compared the top free game server hosting platforms — features, performance, game support, and limitations. Here's which ones are actually worth using.

item.title: Forge vs Pterodactyl: Which Game Server Panel Is Better?
item.description: A detailed comparison of Forge Panel and Pterodactyl/Pelican — features, performance, ease of use, and why hosting providers are switching.

item.title: How to Set Up a Terraria Server for Free
item.description: Host a Terraria server for you and your friends in minutes. Supports tModLoader, custom worlds, and 24/7 uptime.

item.title: How to Host a Discord Bot for Free 24/7
item.description: Stop running your bot on your PC. Deploy your Node.js, Python, or Java Discord bot to the cloud for free with always-on uptime.
